message:
chore(rch): expand .rchignore to exclude additional ephemeral agent directories

Multiple new agent working directories have accumulated that should not
be synced to remote compilation hosts. Adding exclusions prevents
unnecessary bandwidth usage and avoids uploading stale agent artifacts
during remote compilation.

New exclusions:
- codex-check/, codex-conformance/, codex-e2e/, codex-provider-streaming/,
  codex-tools/ (various Codex agent working directories)
- .rch-tmp/ (remote compilation temp files)
- artifacts/, release_artifacts/ (build output directories)
- legacy_pi_mono_code/ (archived monolith code)
- proptest-regressions/ (proptest shrink artifacts)
- _tmp*/ (general temp directories)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
